Here is my stream of consciousness that I sometimes let out into the publics, from normal to more private stuff ig.

I am 24, I'm trying to document my life in the process of rebuilding/ understand what my identity is. There are a lot of things that I like but I can't seem to commit to one, I guess this is something to keep myself more accountable as well.
